description: Curated, prioritized list of Unit 42 posts that should be parsed into TTP entries first. Grouped by theme so the cortex-scraper can batch by directory of relevance. Last 12-month rolling window emphasized; perennial reference docs flagged separately.

priority_legend.P0: Author TTP entry now — flagship POV narrative material.

actor_profiles.title: Threat Group Assessment: Muddled Libra (Updated May 16, 2025)
actor_profiles.notes: Primary actor profile — feeds multiple TTP entries (help-desk MFA reset, VPN credential phishing, AD/Okta lateral movement).

actor_profiles.title: A Peek Into Muddled Libra's Operational Playbook
Muddled Libra: Why Are We So Obsessed With You?
Phantom Taurus: A New Chinese Nexus APT and the NET-STAR Malware Suite
Threat Actor Groups Tracked by Palo Alto Networks Unit 42 (Updated Aug. 1, 2025)
actor_profiles.notes: Canonical actor list — use to populate threat_context.actors.unit42_actor_id values.

ransomware_extortion.title: Anatomy of an Attack: The 'BlackSuit Blitz' at a Global Equipment Manufacturer
ransomware_extortion.notes: End-to-end kill chain narrative — yields ~6 distinct TTP entries (vishing, VPN cred phish, DC compromise, hash extraction, exfil, ESXi mass encryption).

ransomware_extortion.title: The Golden Scale: Bling Libra and the Evolving Extortion Economy

cloud_identity.title: IAM Your Defense Against Cloud Threats
Cloud Threats on the Rise: Alert Trends Show Intensified Attacker Focus on IAM, Exfiltration

Can AI Attack the Cloud? Lessons From the Zealot Autonomous Multi-Agent System

social_engineering.title: 2025 Unit 42 Global Incident Response Report: Social Engineering Edition
social_engineering.notes: 65% initial access via identity-based techniques (per report). Anchor stat for POV narrative.

social_engineering.title: Anatomy of an Attack: The Payroll Pirates and the Power of Social Engineering

supply_chain.title: Weaponizing the Protectors: TeamPCP's Multi-Stage Supply Chain Attack on Security Infrastructure

rolling_threat_bulletins.title: Unit 42 Threat Bulletin — March 2026
rolling_threat_bulletins.notes: Index target — scrape monthly; entries reference newest TTPs.

next_actions: cortex-scraper iterates P0 entries first, emits drafts to ttps/_drafts/.
Each draft must populate at minimum: identity, mitre_attack, references (with this URL as primary), and a stub for execution/detections/panw_mapping for human enrichment.
Re-crawl monthly on the 1st; threat bulletins drive backlog refresh.
exclusions: Skip duplicate cross-posts that don't add unique IOCs/TTPs.
